message: WMI-3 attacker content into authoritative position (attacker-pointer-into-field): content is installed into struct field 'bpf_skb_data_end.data_end' — the position the confused consumer later follows as a trusted reference. [mechanism:attacker-pointer-into-field;indicates=WMI-3] [mem:struct=bpf_skb_data_end;field=data_end;offset=40] [oracle:assert=data_end holds trusted, not attacker-determined, content;assume=externally-originated content installed into the field]
